method_note: Census built from on-disk files. The 5 GRETIL commentary witnesses all cite the same verse text (1 independent family). Gita Press OCR is a genuinely independent typesetting.

witness_families.name: GRETIL verse text (base from 5 commentaries)
witness_families.notes: 5 GRETIL commentary editions all contain identical verse text. Counts as 1 independent saṃhitā base. The verse text is the standard Northern recension.

witness_families.name: Gita Press Tattva Vivecana (OCR)
witness_families.notes: Genuinely independent typesetting from GRETIL. OCR quality is moderate (mixed Hindi/Sanskrit with some artifacts). Different publisher, different editorial tradition.
witness_families.stemma_role: independent publisher edition; third base (with OCR limitations)

witness_families.name: BORI Critical Edition
witness_families.notes: THE critical edition. Highest authority. Not yet acquired.

witness_families.name: Chowkhamba Sanskrit Series edition
witness_families.notes: Publisher edition from Chowkhamba. Not yet acquired.

witness_families.name: Motilal Banarsidass edition
witness_families.notes: Publisher edition from Motilal Banarsidass. Not yet acquired.

summary.verification_note: 2 independent families present (F-GRETIL, F-GITAPRESS). Need ≥1 more independent base for full verification. F-BORI (critical edition) would be the ideal addition.
